purpose: Prepare the unresolved authority-expanding amendment for human review without changing approved control JSON or switching generations.

approve_means: Allow a reviewed gen-001 to expand writable source authority beyond gen-000 so the run can inspect and patch a pinned ylong_runtime source or an equivalent reviewed dependency patch.
Keep the original SOTA fixed target, required outcomes, numeric hard-threshold policy, and no-intermediate-terminal-status policy unchanged.
Require S9 to be proven by real-client-path causal performance evidence and the approved HTTPS proxy benchmark matrix before S10 can run.
reject_means: Keep gen-000 authority limited to ylong_http_client/, benches/, README.md, docs/, and evidence/.
Do not attempt runtime-source changes under this run.
S9 remains unsatisfied unless a new within-scope production-grade candidate is found and survives the fixed SOTA matrix.

why_human_review_is_required.reason: run.control.json amendment_policy does not allow changing authority for live/external resources without human approval; gen-000 writable_evidence_paths do not include ylong_runtime source.

evidence_basis.finding: Focused source and subagent review found no remaining ylong_http_client-internal production-grade lever plausibly cutting nested HTTPS-over-HTTPS-proxy response_read latency by >=30% without semantic changes.

Temporary current-thread runtime benchmark mode was tested and rolled back: geomean throughput ratio vs libcurl was 0.931, p95 ratio 1.160, CPU/request ratio 1.175, RSS ratio 1.184, and the 1000-request row regressed throughput to 0.760.
Prior strace diagnostic narrowed the gap toward runtime readiness/parking behavior rather than network syscall count alone.
Server/proxy send timing was not sufficient to explain the nested response_read gap.

counterexample_gate_for_approval: Reject approval if reviewer believes an untested ylong_http_client-internal production candidate remains with plausible SOTA-scale impact.
Reject approval if current-thread benchmark mode is being treated as a production optimization instead of a rejected diagnostic.
Reject approval if gen-001 would weaken the SOTA target, numeric thresholds, required outcomes, or final counterexample gate.
Reject approval if the proposed runtime-source work cannot be pinned and reproduced.

proposed_review_output_if_approved.required_followup: orchestrator creates reviewed gen-001 runtime control before any runtime-source patching begins

proposed_review_output_if_rejected.required_followup: continue S9 only within gen-000 authority or propose a different reviewed amendment
